title: Nordring Tapered Candles 2.3 x 25 cm Dark Green Pack of 12
features: Dimensions: 2.3 cm in diameter x 25 cm high, Package includes: 12 pieces
Material: paraffin, burning time: approx. 8 hours, made in Germany
Certified according to RAL (do not drip, burn with low smoke and soot, made from quality-assured raw materials)
These candles are suitable for a variety of candle holders, lanterns and arrangements. Thanks to the classic design, the candles fit perfectly with different decoration styles.

With these candles, you can not only create a warm and welcoming atmosphere, but also fully bring out the beauty of your candle holders, lanterns, and floral arrangements. Enjoy the elegance and coziness these candles bring to your surroundings.
description: Product description Nordring 12 taper candles, 2.3 x 25 cm, dark green Safety Warning Keep candles away from flammable materials and never leave a burning candle unattended.
